condition: primary pass AND all shams separated AND secondary criteria met
action: Lifecycle-enabled emergent diversity is the correct mechanism for organism state dimensionality. Promote to full investigation. Dequeue reversed successfully.

condition: PR improves but not 1.5x, or shams not fully separated
action: Lifecycle direction is correct but current parameters (mutation rate, selection pressure) need tuning.

condition: No PR improvement over static population
action: Lifecycle reproduction + mutation does not create measurable trait diversity at these run lengths/parameters.

condition: Population crashes (extinction) or explodes beyond max
action: Lifecycle parameter tuning needed before diversity measurement.
